message.content:
Create the following rofi scripts in `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/` and then update `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/rc.lua` with keybindings.

The scripts dir and dotfiles dir are hardlinked (same inode), so writing to either location updates both.

---

**1. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/clipboard`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: greenclip (yay -S greenclip)
# Start daemon: add `greenclip daemon &` to autostart

if ! command -v greenclip &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "clipboard: install greenclip (yay -S greenclip)"
    exit 1
fi

greenclip print | rofi -dmenu -p "clipboard" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi | xargs -r -I{} greenclip print {}  | xclip -selection clipboard
```

**2. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/emoji`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: rofimoji (yay -S rofimoji)

if ! command -v rofimoji &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "emoji: install rofimoji (yay -S rofimoji)"
    exit 1
fi

rofimoji --action copy --rofi-args "-config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi"
```

**3. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/snippets`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Snippets file: ~/.config/rofi/snippets.txt
# Format: description | content
# Requires: xclip

SNIPPETS="$HOME/.config/rofi/snippets.txt"

if [ ! -f "$SNIPPETS" ]; then
    rofi -e "No snippets file found at $SNIPPETS"
    exit 1
fi

chosen=$(grep -v "^#\|^$" "$SNIPPETS" | rofi -dmenu -p "snippet" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)
[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

content=$(echo "$chosen" | cut -d"|" -f2- | sed 's/^ //')
echo -n "$content" | xclip -selection clipboard
```

**4. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/snippets.txt`** (regular file, goes in scripts dir but actually put it at `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/snippets.txt`)
```
# Snippets — format: description | content
email      | your@email.com
phone      | +1234567890
address    | 123 Main St
shebang sh | #!/usr/bin/env bash
shebang py | #!/usr/bin/env python3
gitignore  | .env\nnode_modules/\n__pycache__/\n*.pyc
```

**5. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/wifi`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: nmcli (networkmanager)

connected=$(nmcli -t -f active,ssid dev wifi | grep "^yes" | cut -d: -f2)

options=$(nmcli -f SSID,SIGNAL,SECURITY dev wifi list 2>/dev/null \
    | tail -n +2 \
    | awk '{printf "%-35s %s%% %s\n", $1, $2, $3}' \
    | sort -t'%' -k1 -rn)

chosen=$(printf "disconnect\n%s" "$options" \
    | rofi -dmenu -p "wifi [${connected:-none}]" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi \
    | awk '{print $1}')

[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

case "$chosen" in
    disconnect) nmcli device disconnect wlan0 ;;
    *)          nmcli device wifi connect "$chosen" ;;
esac
```

**6. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/bluetooth`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: bluez-utils (sudo pacman -S bluez-utils)

if ! command -v bluetoothctl &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "bluetooth: install bluez-utils (sudo pacman -S bluez-utils)"
    exit 1
fi

paired=$(bluetoothctl devices Paired | sed 's/Device [^ ]* //')
connected=$(bluetoothctl devices Connected | sed 's/Device [^ ]* //')

options=$(printf "scan on\n%s" "$paired")
chosen=$(echo "$options" | rofi -dmenu -p "bluetooth" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)
[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

case "$chosen" in
    "scan on")
        kitty --title "bluetoothctl" bluetoothctl scan on &
        ;;
    *)
        mac=$(bluetoothctl devices Paired | grep "$chosen" | awk '{print $2}')
        if echo "$connected" | grep -q "$chosen"; then
            bluetoothctl disconnect "$mac"
        else
            bluetoothctl connect "$mac"
        fi
        ;;
esac
```

**7. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/projects`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Opens a git project in kitty + nvim
# Edit PROJECT_DIRS to your paths

PROJECT_DIRS=(
    "$HOME"
    "$HOME/projects"
    "$HOME/dev"
    "$HOME/work"
)

projects=$(find "${PROJECT_DIRS[@]}" -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null \
    | sed 's|/.git||' \
    | sort)

[ -z "$projects" ] && rofi -e "No git projects found" && exit 1

chosen=$(echo "$projects" | rofi -dmenu -p "project" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)
[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

kitty --directory "$chosen" nvim &
```

**8. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/ssh`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Opens SSH connection in kitty

SSH_CONFIG="$HOME/.ssh/config"

hosts=$(grep -E "^Host " "$SSH_CONFIG" 2>/dev/null \
    | awk '{print $2}' \
    | grep -v "\*" \
    | sort)

if [ -z "$hosts" ]; then
    rofi -e "No hosts in ~/.ssh/config"
    exit 1
fi

chosen=$(echo "$hosts" | rofi -dmenu -p "ssh" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)
[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

kitty ssh "$chosen" &
```

**9. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/media`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: playerctl

if ! command -v playerctl &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "media: install playerctl"
    exit 1
fi

title=$(playerctl metadata --format "{{title}}" 2>/dev/null || echo "nothing playing")
artist=$(playerctl metadata --format "{{artist}}" 2>/dev/null)
status=$(playerctl status 2>/dev/null || echo "stopped")

prompt="${artist:+$artist - }${title} [${status}]"

chosen=$(printf "play/pause\nnext\nprevious\nstop" \
    | rofi -dmenu -p "$prompt" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)

case "$chosen" in
    "play/pause") playerctl play-pause ;;
    "next")       playerctl next ;;
    "previous")   playerctl previous ;;
    "stop")       playerctl stop ;;
esac
```

**10. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/wallpaper`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: feh (sudo pacman -S feh)
# Set WALLPAPER_DIR to your wallpapers folder

WALLPAPER_DIR="$HOME/Pictures/wallpapers"

if ! command -v feh &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "wallpaper: install feh (sudo pacman -S feh)"
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -d "$WALLPAPER_DIR" ]; then
    rofi -e "wallpaper: directory not found: $WALLPAPER_DIR"
    exit 1
fi

chosen=$(find "$WALLPAPER_DIR" -type f \( -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpeg" \) \
    | xargs -I{} basename {} \
    | sort \
    | rofi -dmenu -p "wallpaper" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)

[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0
feh --bg-scale "$WALLPAPER_DIR/$chosen"
```

**11. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/calc`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: bc (sudo pacman -S bc)
# Result is copied to clipboard via xclip

if ! command -v bc &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "calc: install bc (sudo pacman -S bc)"
    exit 1
fi

expr=$(rofi -dmenu -p "calc" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi < /dev/null)
[ -z "$expr" ] && exit 0

result=$(echo "scale=6; $expr" | bc -l 2>/dev/null)
if [ -z "$result" ]; then
    rofi -e "Invalid expression: $expr"
    exit 1
fi

echo -n "$result" | xclip -selection clipboard
rofi -e "$expr = $result (copied)"
```

**12. `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/bookmarks`** (chmod +x)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Requires: jq (sudo pacman -S jq), Brave browser
# Opens selected bookmark in Brave

BOOKMARKS="$HOME/.config/BraveSoftware/Brave-Browser/Default/Bookmarks"

if ! command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
    rofi -e "bookmarks: install jq (sudo pacman -S jq)"
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$BOOKMARKS" ]; then
    rofi -e "bookmarks: Brave bookmarks file not found"
    exit 1
fi

chosen=$(jq -r '.. | objects | select(.type == "url") | "\(.name)\t\(.url)"' "$BOOKMARKS" 2>/dev/null \
    | rofi -dmenu -p "bookmark" -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi)

[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

url=$(echo "$chosen" | awk -F'\t' '{print $2}')
brave "$url" &
```

---

After creating all scripts and making them executable, add these keybindings to `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/rc.lua`.

Find this section (around line 550):
```lua
	awful.key({ MODKEY, altkey }, "space", function()
		awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
	end, { description = "play/pause", group = "audio" })
)
```

Replace it with:
```lua
	awful.key({ MODKEY, altkey }, "space", function()
		awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
	end, { description = "play/pause", group = "audio" }),

	-- Rofi scripts
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "v", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/clipboard")
	end, { description = "clipboard history", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "e", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/emoji")
	end, { description = "emoji picker", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "i", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/snippets")
	end, { description = "snippets", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "n", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/wifi")
	end, { description = "wifi", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "b", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/bluetooth")
	end, { description = "bluetooth", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "g", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/projects")
	end, { description = "git projects", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "y", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/ssh")
	end, { description = "ssh", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "m", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/media")
	end, { description = "media control", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "w", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/wallpaper")
	end, { description = "wallpaper", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "c", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/calc")
	end, { description = "calculator", group = "rofi" }),
	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "b", function()
		awful.util.spawn("~/.config/rofi/scripts/bookmarks")
	end, { description = "bookmarks", group = "rofi" })
)
```

IMPORTANT: The rc.lua file at `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/rc.lua` is the same as the actual one (hardlinked). Write only to the dotfiles path.

Also create the snippets file at `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/snippets.txt` with some sample entries.

Make all scripts executable with chmod +x after creating them.

[ -z "$chosen" ] && exit 0

url=$(echo "$chosen" | awk -F'\t' '{print $2}')
brave "$url" &

content.text:
Everything is in place. Here is a summary of what was done:

**Scripts created** (all `chmod +x`) in `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/scripts/`:
- `clipboard` — greenclip-based clipboard history
- `emoji` — rofimoji emoji picker
- `snippets` — text snippet picker from `~/.config/rofi/snippets.txt`
- `wifi` — nmcli wifi picker with connect/disconnect
- `bluetooth` — bluetoothctl paired device toggle
- `projects` — find git repos and open in kitty + nvim
- `ssh` — pick SSH host from `~/.ssh/config` and open in kitty
- `media` — playerctl play/pause/next/previous/stop
- `wallpaper` — feh wallpaper selector from `~/Pictures/wallpapers`
- `calc` — bc calculator with result copied to clipboard
- `bookmarks` — Brave bookmark picker via jq

**Snippets file** created at `/home/tymoyato/.config/rofi/snippets.txt` with sample entries.

**rc.lua updated** at `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/rc.lua` (lines 554-588) with 11 new keybindings in the `"rofi"` group:

| Key | Script |
|-----|--------|
| `Mod+v` | clipboard |
| `Mod+e` | emoji |
| `Mod+i` | snippets |
| `Mod+n` | wifi |
| `Mod+b` | bluetooth |
| `Mod+g` | projects |
| `Mod+y` | ssh |
| `Mod+m` | media |
| `Mod+Shift+w` | wallpaper |
| `Mod+c` | calc |
| `Mod+Shift+b` | bookmarks |
